ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value or specification of the component */,
  "device_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device type */,
  "package_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component in stock */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the warehouse where the component is stored */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the component's inventory was last updated */,
  "vendor_part_number" TEXT /* Vendor-specific part number for the component */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the component record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the component record was last updated */,
  "reorder_point" INTEGER /* Threshold quantity for reordering the component */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when the threshold is reached */,
  "unit_cost" TEXT /* Unit cost of the component */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the component image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_device_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_type_id") REFERENCES device_types ("device_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_package_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_type_id") REFERENCES package_types ("package_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the warehouse */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the warehouse */,
  "address2" TEXT /* Additional address details for the warehouse */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the warehouse is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the warehouse is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the warehouse location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the warehouse is located */,
  "warehouse_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse manager responsible for the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_types" (
  "device_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device type */,
  "device_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the device type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the device type record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the device type record was last updated */,
  "device_type_category" TEXT /* Category of the device type (e.g., active, passive, electromechanical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_types" (
  "package_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package type */,
  "package_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the package type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the package type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the package type record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the package type record was last updated */,
  "package_type_size" TEXT /* Size of the package type (e.g., SOD-323F, 0805) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component used */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project where the component was used */,
  "quantity_used" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component used in the project */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date the component was used */,
  "usage_description" TEXT /* Description of the component usage in the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the component usage record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the component usage record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_usage_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_usage_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., in_progress, completed, cancelled) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project record was last updated */,
  "project_priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the project (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the manager belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the manager record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the manager record was last updated */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the manager belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchase_orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase order */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component being ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected date of delivery */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the purchase order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the purchase order record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the purchase order record was last updated */,
  "order_total" TEXT /* Total cost of the purchase order */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the purchase order (e.g., pending, paid, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Contact name for the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the supplier record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the supplier record was last updated */,
  "supplier_rating" TEXT /* Rating of the supplier (e.g., excellent, good, fair, poor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)
